title: Umami Japanese Tofu Pasta
description: A romantic and savory dish featuring vegan-friendly umami flavors with the addition of Jamaican curry powder for a unique twist.

ingredients.name: Umami seasoning (like soy sauce or miso paste)

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Rinse the tofu and press it dry with a clean kitchen towel for about 15 minutes.
In a large pot, bring 4 cups of water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook according to package instructions until al dente. Reserve 1 cup of pasta cooking liquid before draining.
Drain the cooked pasta, reserving some cooking liquid, and set aside. In another pan, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat. Sauté chopped shiitake mushrooms for a few minutes.

Add tofu to the pan with vegetable oil and cook until golden brown on all sides. Mix in shiitake mushrooms and umami seasoning. Pour in 3 tablespoons of vegan soy sauce, then add cooked pasta gradually while stirring constantly to avoid clumping.
If the mixture is too dry, add reserved cooking liquid a little at a time until it reaches your desired consistency. Stir in Jamaican curry powder and sliced green onions (scallions).
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes to meld flavors together. Serve hot as a side dish or a main course with steamed vegetables.
